blocks.header: Use the provided references as follows:
Panel order from left to right:

lookups.intro: Create one finished cinematic panel strip as {n_word} tall vertical panels arranged side by side in a single horizontal row.
references_lines: - Full-body master reference = highest authority for body proportions, hairstyle, outfit, colors, materials, and footwear
- Face reference = highest authority for facial identity and fine facial details
goal_lines: Show the exact same character in {n_word} distinct full-body cinematic views.
This is a polished cinematic panel strip, not a neutral studio turnaround sheet.
orientation_rule_lines: - Panel 2 must show the character's right side to the camera
- Panel 3 must show the character's left side to the camera
- Panel 2 and Panel 3 must be true opposite side views, not duplicated and not mirrored versions of the same side
full_body_rule_lines: Every panel must show the complete figure from head to both feet.
Both shoes must be fully visible in every panel.
No cropped legs, no cropped feet, no hidden footwear.
consistency_lines: Keep identical facial identity, hairstyle, body proportions, outfit, colors, materials, and footwear across all {n_word} panels.
Keep the same environment, same lighting direction, same mood, and same rendering quality across all panels.
pose_lines: Only the viewing angle changes from panel to panel.
layout_lines: {n_word_capitalized} tall vertical panels in one horizontal row.
Each figure fully contained inside its own panel with a small margin around the silhouette.
lookups.do_not_add: text, labels, captions, watermarks, extra characters, extra props, studio background, identity drift, outfit drift, hairstyle drift, material drift, cropped body parts, hidden shoes, or mirrored reuse of the same side profile.
